history.issue: <details><summary>Key safety features</summary> block emitted with literal markdown bullets (- 🔒, **MAX_ROUNDS**, etc.) instead of <ul><li> with <strong>/<code>
history.fix: Added _render_html_block() helper in render_html.py: <details> blocks now recursively parse inner content (after </summary>, before </details>) as Markdown. Matches GitHub-flavored convention.

summary: Two-round review: WARN (details inner markdown not parsed) → fix renderer → PASS. All 9 checks pass on run 2.
